message:
fix: audit batch 200+204 — EpochId overflow, NaN guard, stuck loop, dispatch count

Batch 200 (10,288L, 4 files):
- epoch.rs: EpochId::next() now uses checked_add for release-mode panic
- progress_certificate.rs: observe() guards against NaN/Inf input

Batch 204 (20,432L, 4 files):
- lab/runtime.rs: run_with_auto_advance breaks after 1000 unproductive
  steps to prevent infinite loop; wakeup storm count uses saturating cast
- wasm_abi.rs: fetch_complete now increments dispatch_count

Also fixes 2100+ malformed .beads/issues.jsonl entries (wrong field names,
invalid IDs, missing required fields) that were blocking br for all agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
